fields.name: name
fields.description: Strain designation, e.g. GS115, X-33, CBS7435

fields.name: genotype
fields.description: Key genetic markers, e.g. his4, Muts, Mut+

fields.name: methanol_utilization
fields.description: Methanol utilization phenotype: Mut+ / Muts / Mut-

fields.name: copy_number
fields.description: Reported gene copy number, e.g. '10-copy', '1-3 copies'

fields.name: engineering_modifications
fields.description: Reported edits beyond the parent, e.g. 'Prm1 overexpression'

entity_types.name: Promoter
entity_types.description: Transcriptional promoter used in the expression system.

fields.name: name
fields.description: e.g. AOX1, GAP, FLD1, PEX8

fields.name: expression_type
fields.description: constitutive / inducible / hybrid

fields.name: name
fields.description: Vector name, e.g. pPICZα, pGAPZ, pPIC9K

fields.name: secretion_signal
fields.description: alpha-MF / PHO1 / OST1 / none / other

fields.name: selection_marker
fields.description: HIS4 / Zeocin / G418 / Blasticidin / other

fields.name: integration_site
fields.description: AOX1 / AOX2 / HIS4 / GAP / other

fields.name: tag
fields.description: Affinity/epitope tag, e.g. His6, FLAG

entity_types.name: CultureMedium
entity_types.description: Defined or complex culture medium formulation.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Medium designation, e.g. BMMY, BMGY, FM22, BSM

fields.name: purpose
fields.description: Growth phase / induction phase / seed culture, etc.

entity_types.name: FermentationConditionFact
entity_types.description: Process parameters reported for a specific phase or experiment (Layer 3 raw fact).

fields.name: phase
fields.description: e.g. glycerol batch, glycerol fed-batch, methanol induction

fields.name: mode
fields.description: batch / fed-batch / continuous / methanol_induction

fields.name: glycosylation_type
fields.description: N-linked / O-linked / none

entity_types.name: TargetProduct
entity_types.description: Target recombinant protein or metabolite to be produced.

fields.name: type
fields.description: e.g. enzyme, antibody fragment, VLP, metabolite, structural protein

entity_types.name: ProcessParameter
entity_types.description: Quantitative process analytical parameter with context.

fields.name: parameter_name
fields.description: e.g. specific methanol consumption rate

entity_types.name: AnalyticalMethod
entity_types.description: Method used to characterize product or process.

fields.name: name
fields.description: e.g. SDS-PAGE, Western Blot, HPLC-SEC, LC-MS/MS
